hero.heading: Exceptional Care, Beautiful Smiles in Summit, NJ
hero.body:
At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, Dr. Blake Bandeff, DMD and his team deliver advanced care with a personal touch.

You leave feeling heard, comfortable, and confident.

services.section_body: From routine cleanings to full smile makeovers, you get expert care for every stage of life.

card.heading: Dental Crowns
card.body: Custom-fit crowns restore strength and appearance in as few as two visits.

card.heading: Dental Fillings
card.body: Tooth-colored fillings blend seamlessly with your natural smile.

card.heading: Teeth Whitening
card.body: Professional whitening brightens your smile by several shades in one visit.

final_cta.heading: Dental Care Built Around You
final_cta.body: Every patient at Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry receives a plan shaped to their needs.

hero.heading: Cosmetic Dentistry in Summit, NJ
hero.body: Personalized smile makeovers crafted just for you.

item.a: Most cosmetic treatments wrap up in 1 to 3 visits depending on the procedure.
Modern cosmetic dentistry is comfortable, with most patients reporting little to no discomfort.

final_cta.heading: Ready to transform your smile?
final_cta.body: Schedule a consultation with Dr. Bandeff today.

hero.heading: Dental Implants in Summit, NJ
hero.body: Replace missing teeth with permanent solutions that look and feel natural.

final_cta.heading: Restore your full smile.
final_cta.body: Dr. Blake Bandeff, DMD can walk you through your implant options.
